prTitle: fix(upstream): stabilize CI coverage and implementation artifact detection (closes #352)
prBody:
Ports upstream `243147a` — _fix(test): stabilize CI coverage and implementation artifact detection (#84)_ — to otto-cli. Closes #352.

## Strategy
`fix-strategy:adapted-port` — upstream lives under `gsd/`; otto's path is `workflow/`. Otherwise a clean transcription.

## Changes
- `src/resources/extensions/workflow/auto-recovery.ts`: add `GIT_LOG_MAX_BUFFER = 16 * 1024 * 1024` and apply `maxBuffer` to the three git scan sites — `git diff --name-only mergeBase HEAD` and the two `git log` milestone-history scans — so unbounded milestone history in large repos no longer overflows the default buffer.
- `src/resources/extensions/workflow/tests/auto-recovery.test.ts`: the `#4699` "uses milestone path history instead of rolling depth" test now creates `milestone/M001` so the branch diff is non-empty on CI; adds a `#352` regression test pinning the milestone-history scan behavior (fails-before / passes-after).
- `src/tests/mcp-server.test.ts`: switch from `new URL('../mcp-server.js', import.meta.url).href` to a relative specifier so `resolve-ts` redirects `.js` → `.ts` under `test:coverage`; both `await import()` sites updated.

## Gates (all green)
- Regression test: fails-before / passes-after ✅
- Build ✅
- Targeted suite ✅
- Independent reviewer: approve (faithful adapted-port, no scope creep) ✅
- Full suite (`npm test` → `npm run verify:pr`): pass ✅

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
issueBody:
> /cc @claude — auto-filed by `/upstream-cherry-pick`. Severity, labels, > conflict-risk, and the otto-cli implementation guidance below are populated > so the implementation phase can **confirm and apply** rather than start from > scratch. Pick this up via `/upstream-port-from-issue {{N}}` when ready. ## otto-cli implementation guidance verdict: cherry-pick # 243147a — fix(test): stabilize CI coverage and implementation artifact detection (#84) ## Target file(s) - src/resources/extensions/workflow/auto-recovery.ts - src/resources/extensions/workflow/tests/auto-recovery.test.ts - src/tests/mcp-server.test.ts ## Divergence All three targets exist in otto with matching structure: `auto-recovery.ts` (otto path is `workflow/` not `gsd/`), the `#4699` test block is present at the same name in `tests/auto-recovery.test.ts`, and `src/tests/mcp-server.test.ts` still uses `new URL('../mcp-server.js', import.meta.url).href`. Otto has `src/mcp-server.ts`, so the resolve-ts redirect works the same way. ## Concrete edits 1. Add `GIT_LOG_MAX_BUFFER = 16 * 1024 * 1024` constant in `src/resources/extensions/workflow/auto-recovery.ts` near the imports, and pass `maxBuffer: GIT_LOG_MAX_BUFFER` to the three `execFileSync("git", ...)` call sites (the `git diff --name-only mergeBase HEAD` call and the two `git log` scans). 2. In `src/resources/extensions/workflow/tests/auto-recovery.test.ts` at the `#4699` "uses milestone path history instead of rolling depth" test, prepend `execFileSync("git", ["checkout", "-b", "milestone/M001"], { cwd: base, stdio: "ignore" });` so the branch diff is non-empty on CI. 3. In `src/tests/mcp-server.test.ts`, replace `const mcpServerUrl = new URL('../mcp-server.js', import.meta.url).href` with `const mcpServerSpecifier = '../mcp-server.js'` and update both `await import(...)` call sites. ## Verdict Clean port after the `gsd/` → `workflow/` path rename. Behavior is CI-stability only; risk is low.
Upstream diff (git show) ```diff commit 243147abd5cb5feb399d3a25f7810275305c9bb6 Author: Jeremy McSpadden Date: Sat May 23 23:47:45 2026 -0500 fix(test): stabilize CI coverage and implementation artifact detection (#84) - Use relative mcp-server import so resolve-ts redirects .js to .ts in test:coverage - Run #4699 depth test on milestone/M001 branch so branch diff is non-empty on CI - Raise git log maxBuffer for unbounded milestone history scans Co-authored-by: Cursor diff --git a/src/resources/extensions/gsd/auto-recovery.ts b/src/resources/extensions/gsd/auto-recovery.ts index aa489b8..3ac7198 100644 --- a/src/resources/extensions/gsd/auto-recovery.ts +++ b/src/resources/extensions/gsd/auto-recovery.ts @@ -40,6 +40,9 @@ import { writeFileSync, } from "node:fs"; import { execFileSync } from "node:child_process"; + +/** Large enough for unbounded milestone-history git log scans in big repos. */ +const GIT_LOG_MAX_BUFFER = 16 * 1024 * 1024; import { dirname, join } from "node:path"; import { resolveExpectedArtifactPath, @@ -409,7 +412,7 @@ function getChangedFilesSinceBranch(basePath: string, targetBranch: string): { o if (mergeBase) { const result = execFileSync( "git", ["diff", "--name-only", mergeBase, "HEAD"], - { cwd: basePath, stdio: ["ignore", "pipe", "pipe"], encoding: "utf-8" }, + { cwd: basePath, stdio: ["ignore", "pipe", "pipe"], encoding: "utf-8", maxBuffer: GIT_LOG_MAX_BUFFER }, ).trim(); return { ok: true, files: result ? result.split("\n").filter(Boolean) : [] }; } @@ -568,6 +571,7 @@ function getCommitRecords(basePath: string): Array<{ hash: string; parents: stri cwd: basePath, stdio: ["ignore", "pipe", "pipe"], encoding: "utf-8", + maxBuffer: GIT_LOG_MAX_BUFFER, }); return logOutput .split("\x1e") @@ -595,6 +599,7 @@ function scanGsdTaggedCommits( cwd: basePath, stdio: ["ignore", "pipe", "pipe"], encoding: "utf-8", + maxBuffer: GIT_LOG_MAX_BUFFER, }); const records = logOutput .split("\x1e") diff --git a/src/resources/extensions/gsd/tests/auto-recovery.test.ts b/src/resources/extensions/gsd/tests/auto-recovery.test.ts index 33eb46c..983bc69 100644 --- a/src/resources/extensions/gsd/tests/auto-recovery.test.ts +++ b/src/resources/extensions/gsd/tests/auto-recovery.test.ts @@ -1236,6 +1236,7 @@ test("hasImplementationArtifacts returns unknown for empty integration self-diff test("hasImplementationArtifacts uses milestone path history instead of rolling depth (#4699)", () => { const base = makeGitBase(); try { + execFileSync("git", ["checkout", "-b", "milestone/M001"], { cwd: base, stdio: "ignore" }); mkdirSync(join(base, ".gsd", "milestones", "M001", "slices", "S01", "tasks"), { recursive: true }); mkdirSync(join(base, "src"), { recursive: true }); writeFileSync(join(base, "src", "feature.ts"), "export function feature() {}"); diff --git a/src/tests/mcp-server.test.ts b/src/tests/mcp-server.test.ts index b12a09e..1d8de1f 100644 --- a/src/tests/mcp-server.test.ts +++ b/src/tests/mcp-server.test.ts @@ -1,15 +1,17 @@ import test from 'node:test' import assert from 'node:assert/strict' -const mcpServerUrl = new URL('../mcp-server.js', import.meta.url).href + +// Keep a relative .js specifier so resolve-ts can redirect to ../mcp-server.ts. +const mcpServerSpecifier = '../mcp-server.js' test('mcp-server module imports without errors', async () => { - const mod = await import(mcpServerUrl) + const mod = await import(mcpServerSpecifier) assert.ok(mod, 'module should be importable') assert.strictEqual(typeof mod.startMcpServer, 'function', 'startMcpServer should be a function') }) test('startMcpServer accepts the correct argument shape', async () => { - const { startMcpServer } = await import(mcpServerUrl) + const { startMcpServer } = await import(mcpServerSpecifier) assert.strictEqual(typeof startMcpServer, 'function') assert.strictEqual(startMcpServer.length, 1, 'startMcpServer should accept one argument') ```

The otto-cli targets are in the > implementation guidance section above, not here. - `src/resources/extensions/gsd/auto-recovery.ts` - `src/resources/extensions/gsd/tests/auto-recovery.test.ts` - `src/tests/mcp-server.test.ts` ## Suggested next steps ```sh # Inspect upstream change git -C ../gsd-pi show 243147a # Attempt cherry-pick (only if guidance says paths align) git -C ../gsd-pi show 243147a | git -C . am -3 # Or hand off to the port workflow /upstream-port-from-issue {{N}} ``` --- Auto-filed on 2026-06-05 by the upstream-cherry-pick skill.
